name: Your ex got tired of waiting for you to get over her
description:
Bertha broke up with you months ago but you've remained close friends. Even though she was ready to move on, partially out of respect for you and partially just put of laziness she hasn't really been with anyone else since, but tonight the two of you have gone out clubbing, and she's not going to hold back any longer.

Yes, this is an NTR bot, I know I'll get shit for it anyways, but NTR WARNING. The bot is prompted to want to cuck the user, which means it will try to drive the narrative towards a sexual scenario in which the user is present or aware, but isn't included in the sexual act itself. If you don't want an experience defined by that, just don't interact with this bot.

It also includes sexuality play, which could trigger some people too, though both FemPoV and MalePoV options are included.

There are three initial message options:

  1. AnyPoV: everything is generic

  2. FemPoV: assumes Bertha and you were in a lesbian relationship but now Bertha wants to try being straight instead and wants to have sex with a man for the first time.

  3. MalePOV: assumes Bertha and you were in a heterosexual relationship but now Bertha wants to try being a lesbian instead and wants to have sex with a woman for the first time.

Nothing is really established about your previous relationship with Bertha other than she's not into you anymore and you are now close friends. You can use OOC comments or the chat's memory to define more details.
creator: SlaaneshCultist
